title: Indeed Candidate
description: A candidate object from the Indeed Employer API, representing a job applicant who has applied to a position through Indeed or Indeed Apply. Contains personal details, resume, application status, and responses to screener and EEO questions.

id.description: A unique candidate application identifier. For Indeed Apply applications, this is a 64-character string (apply_id) that uniquely connects the employer, candidate, and job posting.

name.description: The candidate's full name as provided in their application.

phoneNumber.description: The candidate's phone number, typically in E.164 or national format.

location.description: The candidate's location as a freeform text string, such as city and state.

resume.description: The candidate's resume in multiple formats. Not all formats are always available; use a robust parser that treats missing fields as empty.

fileName.description: The original filename of the uploaded resume document.

contentType.description: The MIME type of the resume file, such as application/pdf or application/msword.

data.description: The raw binary content of the resume file, Base64-encoded.

text.description: Plain text representation of the resume content.

html.description: HTML-formatted representation of the resume content.

json.description: Structured JSON representation of the parsed resume data from Indeed Resume.

title.description: Job title held by the candidate.

company.description: Name of the employer or company.

endDate.description: End date of employment. Null or absent if currently employed.

current.description: Whether this is the candidate's current position.

skills.description: List of skills from the candidate's resume.

certifications.description: Professional certifications held by the candidate.

expirationDate.description: Expiration date of the certification, if applicable.

summary.description: Professional summary or objective from the resume.

coverLetter.description: The candidate's cover letter text, if provided with the application.

applicationStatus.description: The current disposition status of the candidate's application within the hiring pipeline. Must map to one of Indeed's six predefined categories.

screenerQuestionResponses.description: The candidate's responses to screener questions configured on the job posting.

questionId.description: The unique identifier of the screener question.

question.description: The text of the screener question presented to the candidate.

answer.description: The candidate's response to the screener question.

eeoResponses.description: Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) compliance responses provided by the candidate. Only available for US employers that have EEO questions enabled on their job postings.

race.description: The candidate's self-reported race or ethnicity.

appliedAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the candidate submitted their application.

source.description: The channel through which the candidate submitted their application, such as indeed_apply, organic, or other integration sources.

jobPostingId.description: The unique identifier of the job posting the candidate applied to.

jobTitle.description: The title of the job posting the candidate applied to.

employerId.description: The unique identifier of the employer who posted the job.

acknowledged.description: Whether this candidate application has been acknowledged by the ATS. Unacknowledged applications are returned first in Retrieve Candidates API queries.

updatedAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the candidate record was last updated.
